def negative_feature_logic_embedded_in_process_entrypoint():
    rule_id = "feature_logic_embedded_in_process_entrypoint"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag CLI, worker, or service entrypoints that own business branching instead of delegating to focused application services."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
